allow: Bash(sed -i 's/roleSlug: "subscriber", status: "active", verifyToken/roleSlug: "reader", status: "active", verifyToken/' src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts)
Bash(sed -i 's/const subs = allUsers.filter\(\(u\) => u.roleSlug === "subscriber"\);/const subs = allUsers.filter\(\(u\) => u.roleSlug === "reader"\);/' scripts/seed-demo.mjs)

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const g=await p.article.groupBy\({by:['\\''authorUserId'\\''],where:{authorKind:'\\''ugc'\\''},_count:true}\);console.log\('\\''ugc by owner:'\\'',g.map\(x=>x.authorUserId+'\\'':'\\''+x._count\).join\('\\'', '\\''\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const g=await p.article.groupBy\({by:['\\''authorUserId'\\''],where:{authorKind:'\\''ugc'\\''},_count:true}\);console.log\('\\''per-writer ownership restored:'\\'',g.map\(x=>x.authorUserId+'\\'':'\\''+x._count\).join\('\\'', '\\''\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const r=await p.story.deleteMany\({where:{title:{in:['\\''Стори писателя'\\'','\\''Стори компании'\\'']}}}\);console.log\('\\''removed test stories:'\\'',r.count\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const s=await p.story.findMany\({select:{id:true,title:true},orderBy:{order:'\\''desc'\\''},take:6}\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s,null,0\)\);const all=await p.story.count\(\);console.log\('\\''total stories:'\\'',all\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const r=await p.story.deleteMany\({where:{id:{in:['\\''smrj9dp8l'\\'','\\''smrj9doyx'\\'']}}}\);console.log\('\\''removed test stories:'\\'',r.count,'\\''-> total now:'\\'',await p.story.count\(\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')
